about_contact_text: If you have any question or you would like to tell me about your project, reach out via:
about_highlight_text: Creating a positive impact, because behind every translation, there’s a person with a goal: accessing healthcare or other public services, migrating to another country, expanding a business internationally, publishing a new scientific discovery, and more. I work with passion, commitment and professionalism on every project.
about_highlight_title: What I enjoy most about translation
about_lead: I’m Lucía Giulietti, an English technical-scientific translator from Buenos Aires, Argentina, and a NAATI-certified translator and interpreter in Australia.
about_meta_description: Meet Lucía Giulietti, a technical-scientific translator and NAATI-certified translator for English ↔ Spanish. Training, international experience and professional commitment.
about_meta_title: About me | Lucía Giulietti – Technical-scientific & NAATI translator
about_og_description: Training, experience and NAATI certification. Professional English ↔ Spanish translations.
about_p1: Since 2021, I’ve helped clients worldwide achieve their goals: publishing scientific papers, translating health courses, expanding into foreign markets, promoting climate action, and more. I’ve been part of global organisations and the translation team of the International Federation of Translators and Intepreters, so my work meets the highest industry standards.
about_p2: In 2023, I moved to Australia, where I travelled and immersed myself in the local culture. Then, with the aim of supporting the Spanish-speaking community here, I obtained the NAATI certification (English <> Spanish) in translation and interpreting and became a trusted ally for my clients. I follow the NAATI and AUSIT codes of ethics to ensure the highest standards of quality, confidentiality and professionalism in every project.
about_photo_caption:
Lucia Giulietti,
technical-scientific translator,
NAATI-certified translator & interpreter
about_twitter_description: Technical-scientific and NAATI translator (English ↔ Spanish). Learn about my background and experience.
faq1_p1: The quote and turnaround time depend on the number of pages, the document format and content complexity. In general, one-page documents are delivered within 24 hours after confirmation and payment. Longer documents are usually delivered within 1 to 3 business days. A 15% surcharge applies to urgent documents.
faq1_q: How much does a NAATI translation cost? What’s the turnaround time?
faq2_p1: Projects are confirmed once the payment is processed. We’ll share our bank details or alternatives if you don’t have an Australian account.
faq3_p1: The translation is delivered by email with a digital stamp, unless a printed version is requested. Digital NAATI translations are just as valid as ink-stamped translations. Translations do not expire.
faq4_p1: NAATI is the Australian national authority that sets standards, assesses competencies and certifies translators and interpreters.
faq5_p1: AUSIT is the Australian Institute of Interpreters and Translators. It represents language professionals nationwide to ensure quality standards in the industry. Members engage in ongoing professional development and adhere to a code of ethics.
feat1_p: You’ll speak with a professional who adapts to your needs, answers your questions and helps you reach your goals because we understand that, behind every translation, there’s a person working toward a migration, career or education dream.
feat2_p: When we work with important documents, accuracy is essential. That’s why our translations are handled by specialised professionals who use the right terminology and follow each industry’s standards for documents to be accepted by the relevant authorities.
feat3_p: We know your time is valuable. That’s why we provide clear, convenient turnaround times so you can plan without delays. We guarantee confidentiality and adhere to the NAATI and AUSIT codes of ethics.

srv1_p: We work with a range of industries and help businesses expand, attract more clients, and meet each country’s quality standards and cultural expectations. We build translation memories to maintain consistency and terminology databases to ensure accuracy for every client.
srv2_li6: Reference letters, payslips and other employment documents
srv2_p1: We provide NAATI-stamped translations for migration, study or work purposes in Australia. We work with legal translation experts to ensure documents are accurate and accepted by Australian authorities. Translations are delivered digitally or with a physical stamp, as required. We want to help you achieve your dreams!
srv2_p2: We translate all types of documents. Feel free to contact us if your document is not on the list.
srv2_subtitle: What types of documents do we translate?
srv3_p: We provide a human review of texts generated by translation memories or machine translation tools. Does your brand image or the dissemination of important information depend on a translation? Then it’s essential to have it reviewed by trained human professionals. We’re here to help!
srv4_p: We act as an intermediary in spoken conversations—both in person and remotely—to ensure the message is conveyed accurately and appropriately.
srv4_p1: We act as an intermediary in spoken conversations, both in person and remotely, to ensure the message is conveyed accurately and appropriately.
srv4_subtitle: In which settings do we work?
svc1_p: Accurate, specialised translations of technical or scientific documents.
svc2_p: Official NAATI-certified translations for migration, education and employment purposes.
svc3_p: Professional certified interpreting services for official and daily-life settings.
svc4_p: Accurate conversion of audiovisual content into clear, structured text.
svc5_p: Professional review of texts or translations produced with automated tools.
timeline_aria: Steps to request a NAATI quote
timeline_p1: Write your message, fill in your details and choose the turnaround time. When you click on “Send enquiry”, you’ll be able to attach documents in PDF or JPG.
timeline_p2: We'll check page count, format and complexity to quote accurately.
timeline_p3: We'll send the quote and delivery timeframe, and we wait for your confirmation.
